coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of test automation and where it fits in delivery
Elementary knowledge of a scripting language used for test code
Ability to run existing automated suites and read their reports
Basic understanding of locating UI elements with selectors
Ability to write a simple automated check under guidance
Familiarity with version control for test code
Basic understanding of why automated tests become flaky
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with a CI service that triggers test runs
Elementary understanding of REST APIs
Basic familiarity with browser developer tools for inspecting elements
indicators: Requires close supervision on automation tasks
Runs and reports on existing automated suites
Learning the fundamentals of writing test code

coreCompetencies: Ability to write automated UI checks for simple flows
Implementation of the page object pattern to structure test code
Practical use of a test automation framework and its assertions
Maintenance and repair of existing automated tests
Implementation of data-driven tests with external inputs
Ability to wire tests into a CI pipeline stage
Basic automated API checks against documented endpoints
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with responsive layout testing
Understanding of test setup and teardown for isolation
Basic understanding of reporting and screenshots on failure
indicators: Writes and maintains automated tests with supervision
Keeps existing suites green and diagnoses simple failures
Applies the page object pattern consistently

coreCompetencies: Design of a maintainable automation framework structure
Implementation of robust selector strategies resistant to UI change

Implementation of end-to-end scenarios across multiple screens
Use of mocking and stubbing to isolate the system under test
Automated API testing including negative and edge cases
Integration of suites into CI with useful failure reporting
complementaryCompetencies: Familiarity with native mobile automation
Understanding of the screenplay pattern as an alternative to page objects
Basic understanding of visual regression tooling
indicators: Designs a framework structure others can extend
Reduces suite flakiness with measurable results
Mentors juniors on writing reliable test code

coreCompetencies: Architecture of an automation framework for a product across UI and API layers

Integration of automation into CI/CD with gating and reporting
complementaryCompetencies: Understanding of performance test scripting to support specialists
Familiarity with accessibility automation checks
Understanding of containerized test environments
indicators: Owns the automation architecture for a product
Sets automation patterns and standards for the team

indicators: Designs automation architecture for a product line autonomously

Familiarity with the automation needs of new product areas
Understanding of maintainable, long-lived test code practices
indicators: Shapes automation architecture across products
